portfolio_rationale: GOOGL stands out as the top pick with the cleanest technical picture (TechnicalAnalyst confidence 0.9, all bullish factors, zero bearish technical flags, +8.4% 5-day momentum, +15.3% 20-day momentum) combined with strong fundamentals and minimal debt. LLY earns second place on the strength of exceptional revenue growth (85%), the highest fundamental analyst confidence (0.9), and broadly positive news sentiment, though the extreme RSI (89) warrants a size discount. AAPL and AMZN are both bullish but carry more technical weakness; AMZN's RSI of 19 and deeply negative momentum make it a mean-reversion bet rather than a conviction long. BRK.B received a neutral judge signal and is excluded.

GOOGL.reason: Strongest technical setup in the universe (all bullish, zero bearish technical flags, high volume, strong 5d and 20d momentum) combined with clean balance sheet and high judge confidence.

LLY.reason: Highest fundamental analyst confidence (0.9), extraordinary revenue growth of 85%, positive news sentiment, and strong profitability; RSI at 89 limits sizing.

AAPL.reason: Solid fundamentals across all profitability metrics with positive 20-day momentum, though MACD weakness and liquidity flags reduce conviction relative to GOOGL and LLY.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamentals and oversold RSI (19) offer rebound potential, but deeply negative 5d/20d momentum and multiple technical bearish flags warrant a smaller position.

XOM.reason: Solid technicals and positive cash flows, but thin fundamental data coverage, crowded-positioning risk flag, and energy sector macro headwinds limit conviction.

BRK.B.reason: Judge signal is neutral; negative revenue growth, overbought RSI, and balanced bull/bear cases do not support a long position.
